problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
mechanism: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion
hypothesis: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
